images.alt: Silhouette of pregnant woman - matches logo vibe

instructions_to_main_agent: UPDATE THEME FILE: Replace content of /app/frontend/src/constants/theme.ts with the provided theme object structure.
LOAD FONTS: Ensure fonts are loaded in the root layout (App.js or app/_layout.js) before rendering.
APPLY STYLES: Use the new theme constants for all colors and typography.
LOGO INTEGRATION: Use the SVG logo if possible (react-native-svg), otherwise fallback to JPG.
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure text contrast ratios are met (use primary.dark for text on light backgrounds).
DO NOT BREAK: Keep existing logic, only update the visual layer (colors, fonts, spacings).
